languages.text: "Адептус Механикус сообщают, что крайне опечалены несчастьем, случившимся с древней реликвией, и готовы направить на флагман ученого мужа, сведущего в восстановлении археотечных машин. Его имя — Эоганн Фебрус, и он готов не только лично оказать помощь династии, но и обучить технопровидцев корабля всем необходимым ритуалам. Взамен алые жрецы просят лишь посетить станцию и поведать им о судьбе Чудотворного Реактора Синтеза из системы Райкад Минорис".

traits.locale_text: "В сообщении — приглашение посетить станцию с мольбой поведать о судьбе Чудотворного Реактора Синтеза из системы Райкад Минорис. В обмен почтенные {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрецы{/g} жаждут предложить вам некое... сотрудничество?" {n}В голосе Мастера вокса проскальзывает удивление.{/n}

languages.text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."
languages.original_text: "Адептус Механикус сообщают, что крайне опечалены несчастьем, случившимся с древней реликвией, и готовы направить на флагман ученого мужа, сведущего в восстановлении археотечных машин. Его имя — Эоганн Фебрус, и он готов не только лично оказать помощь династии, но и обучить технопровидцев корабля всем необходимым ритуалам. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."

languages.text: "Das Adeptus Mechanicus sagt, dass es angesichts der Notlage des alten Reliktes überaus betrübt ist und die Entsendung eines gelehrigen Mannes auf das Flaggschiff vorbereitet, der in der Wiederherstellung von Archäotech-Maschinen bewandert ist. Sein Name ist Eogunn Februs, und er ist bereit, die Dynastie persönlich zu unterstützen und die Maschinenseher alle erforderlichen Rituale zu lehren. Im Gegenzug bitten Euch die roten Priester lediglich, dass Ihr die Station besucht und sie über das Schicksal des wundersamen Fusionsreaktors von Rykad Minoris aufklärt."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."

Sein Name ist Eogunn Februs, und er ist bereit, die Dynastie persönlich zu unterstützen und die Maschinenseher alle erforderlichen Rituale zu lehren. Im Gegenzug bitten Euch die roten Priester lediglich, dass Ihr die Station besucht und sie über das Schicksal des wundersamen Fusionsreaktors von Rykad Minoris aufklärt."

languages.text: « L'Adeptus Mechanicus vous fait savoir qu'ils sont grandement peinés par les épreuves qu'a subies l'ancienne relique, et qu'ils se tiennent prêts à dépêcher sur votre vaisseau un érudit versé dans la restauration de machines archéotechnologiques. Son nom est Eogunn Februs, et il souhaite non seulement apporter son aide à la dynastie, mais également enseigner les rituels nécessaires aux technaugures à votre bord. En retour, le clergé écarlate ne demande que deux choses : votre venue à bord de la station et des informations sur le réacteur à fusion miraculeux de Rykad Minoris. »
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."

traits.locale_text: « L'Adeptus Mechanicus vous fait savoir qu'ils sont grandement peinés par les épreuves qu'a subies l'ancienne relique, et qu'ils se tiennent prêts à dépêcher sur votre vaisseau un érudit versé dans la restauration de machines archéotechnologiques. Son nom est Eogunn Februs, et il souhaite non seulement apporter son aide à la dynastie, mais également enseigner les rituels nécessaires aux technaugures à votre bord. En retour, le clergé écarlate ne demande que deux choses : votre venue à bord de la station et des informations sur le réacteur à fusion miraculeux de Rykad Minoris. »

languages.text: “机械修会表示，他们对那远古圣物遭受的不幸深感痛惜，并准备派一位精通远古科技机器修复的博学之士前来旗舰。此人名叫伊奥贡·费布鲁斯，他不仅愿意亲自协助王朝，还会将一切必要仪式传授给舰上的引擎先知。作为回报，这些红衣神甫唯一的请求，就是您亲自造访该星站，向他们说明来自小莱卡德的神赐聚变反应堆的最终命运。”
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."

traits.locale_text: “机械修会表示，他们对那远古圣物遭受的不幸深感痛惜，并准备派一位精通远古科技机器修复的博学之士前来旗舰。此人名叫伊奥贡·费布鲁斯，他不仅愿意亲自协助王朝，还会将一切必要仪式传授给舰上的引擎先知。作为回报，这些红衣神甫唯一的请求，就是您亲自造访该星站，向他们说明来自小莱卡德的神赐聚变反应堆的最终命运。”

languages.text: «Los miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus informan de su aflicción ante el infortunio sufrido por la antigua reliquia, y están dispuestos a enviar a la nave insignia a un erudito versado en la restauración de máquinas de arqueotecnología. Se llama Eogunn Februs, y, además de ayudar personalmente a la dinastía, está dispuesto a enseñar a los visioingenieros de la nave todos los rituales necesarios. A cambio, los sacerdotes carmesíes solo piden que visite la estación y les informe del destino del Reactor de Fusión Milagroso de Rykad Minoris».
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."

traits.locale_text: «Los miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus informan de su aflicción ante el infortunio sufrido por la antigua reliquia, y están dispuestos a enviar a la nave insignia a un erudito versado en la restauración de máquinas de arqueotecnología. Se llama Eogunn Februs, y, además de ayudar personalmente a la dinastía, está dispuesto a enseñar a los visioingenieros de la nave todos los rituales necesarios. A cambio, los sacerdotes carmesíes solo piden que visite la estación y les informe del destino del Reactor de Fusión Milagroso de Rykad Minoris».

languages.text: 「アデプトゥス・メカニクスは、いにしえの遺物に降りかかった不幸を深く嘆いており、アーケオテックの機械の修復に通じた学者を旗艦へ派遣する用意があるとのことです。その者の名はエオガン・フェブラス。彼は王朝に直接手を貸すのみならず、艦のエンジンシーアたちに必要な儀式のすべてを伝授する用意があるそうです。その見返りとして、緋色の司祭たちが求めるのはただ一つ――ステーションを訪れ、リカド・ミノリス産の〈奇跡の融合炉〉の行方を彼らに知らせることだけです。」{n}ヴォックス・マスターの声には驚きが混じっている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. His name is Eogunn Februs, and he is ready not only to personally assist the dynasty, but also to teach the ship's Enginseers all the necessary rituals. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."

languages.text: "Adeptus Mechanicus, kadim yadigârın başına gelen talihsizlikten büyük üzüntü duyduklarını ve arkeotek makinelerinin restorasyonunda uzmanlaşmış bilgili birini sancak gemisine göndermeye hazır olduklarını bildiriyor. Adı Eogunn Februs. Sadece hanedanlığa bizzat yardım etmeye değil, aynı zamanda geminin Mühedyumlarına gerekli tüm ayinleri öğretmeye de hazır. Buna karşılık kızıl rahipler, yalnızca istasyonu ziyaret etmenizi ve Rykad Minoris'teki Mucizevi Füzyon Reaktörü'nün akıbeti hakkında onları bilgilendirmenizi istiyor."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Mechanicus report that they are most aggrieved by the misfortune that has befallen the ancient relic, and they are prepared to dispatch to the flagship a learned man versed in the restoration of archeotech machines. In return, the crimson priests ask only that you visit the station and inform them of the fate of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor from Rykad Minoris."
